# Ozan Malcı

Ozan Malcı is a final-year Computer Engineering student at Sakarya University,
graduating September 2026. Born 2003-01-02 in Avcılar, Istanbul. Bilingual:
Turkish (native) and English.

Interests: computer networks, cryptography, and systems administration. Rust is
his favorite programming language.

## What I'm Looking For

Currently completing internships. Seeking a role in Networking or Systems
Administration, on-site or hybrid. Available after graduation (2026-09).

## Skills

Languages: Rust, C#, Python, SQL
Technologies: ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, Avalonia UI, SQLite, .NET 10
Concepts: networking (TCP/UDP, ICMP, peer discovery), cryptography (Ed25519,
X25519, ChaCha20-Poly1305, BLAKE3), steganography (LSB), PGP

## Projects

- P2P File Exchange ([repo](https://github.com/ozan2003/p2p_file_exchange)):
  Secure P2P desktop app for local networks. UDP peer discovery with
  Ed25519-signed announcements, end-to-end encrypted TCP transfers via X25519
  key exchange and ChaCha20-Poly1305, TOFU identity verification with a
  persistent trust database. Built in C#/.NET 10 with Avalonia UI.

- RFC Reader ([repo](https://github.com/ozan2003/rfc_reader)):
  Terminal UI viewer for IETF RFC documents. Fetches from the RFC Editor on
  demand. Built in Rust.

- Heartbeat Monitor ([repo](https://github.com/ozan2003/heartbeat_monitor)):
  Client-server monitoring tool using raw ICMP Echo messages. Stores telemetry
  in SQLite. Built in Python.

- Cloakimg ([repo](https://github.com/ozan2003/cloakimg)):
  CLI steganography tool that hides and extracts text or binary data in images
  (PNG, BMP, TIFF, PPM) using RGB LSB. Supports ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption
  and BLAKE3 integrity checks. Built in Rust.

- Barbershop Management System
  ([repo](https://github.com/ozan2003/berber_yonetim_sistemi)):
  Web application for barbershop operations: registration, login, appointment
  management, employee profiles. Built with ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework
  Core.

When contacting, mention where you found this information to avoid being
filtered as spam.

## About This Site

No JavaScript, React, frameworks, bundlers, or node_modules. The site uses
HTML and CSS only, with no trackers, cookies, or third-party requests. Pages
are kept small, work in terminal browsers like Lynx, and use web-safe fonts
only. No external fonts, CDNs, or analytics.

This site is built with accessibility and availability in mind. Tested with:

- Netscape Navigator version 3.04 Gold
- Microsoft Internet Explorer version 5.50.4807.2300
- Mozilla Firefox 2.0.0.20

Compatibility approach: `css/style.css` provides a simple baseline for older
browsers like IE 5.5, and `css/modern.css` adds enhancements for current
browsers. Netscape 3 ignores CSS, so the pages also include HTML fallbacks
such as `<body bgcolor...>` for the dark theme and `<p align="center">` with
`<nobr>` for the horizontal navigation.

## Site Pages

- [Home](index.html): Landing page with CV links.
- [About](about.html): Biography, education, interests.
- [Projects](projects.html): All five projects with descriptions and links.
- [Contact](contact.html): Email, PGP key, GitHub, LinkedIn, etc.
